output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?building ?buildingLabel ?height WHERE {
  ?building wdt:P31 wd:Q414165 ; wdt:P2048 ?heightStatement ; wdt:P571 ?completionDate .
  ?heightStatement ps:P2048 ?heightQuantity .
  ?heightQuantity wikibase:amount ?height .
  FILTER(?completionDate <= "2018-12-31" ^^ xsd:date)
  ?building rdfs:label ?buildingLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?buildingLabel) = "en")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?height)
LIMIT 1

output.formatted:
Burj Khalifa

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?building ?buildingLabel ?height WHERE {
  ?building wdt:P31 wd:Q414165 ; wdt:P2048 ?heightStatement ; wdt:P571 ?completionDate .
  ?heightStatement ps:P2048 ?heightQuantity .
  ?heightQuantity wikibase:amount ?height .
  FILTER(?completionDate <= "2018-12-31" ^^ xsd:date)
  ?building rdfs:label ?buildingLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?buildingLabel) = "en")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?height)
LIMIT 1
```
